title: Resolution Authorizing the Honorable Mayor Caesar P. Perez to Enter Into and Sign in Behalf of the Municipal Government of Los Baños, in a Memorandum of Agreement MOA) with the Qualified E-trike Beneficiary Under the Department of Energy (DOE) E-trike Project. (AUTHOR: HON. MARLO PJ A. ALIPON, 02/24/2020)
